subject: WM-0180 review: verified
body: No blocking findings. Prior Mediums are closed: PS5.1 probes show logicalProcessorCount 1.5 and Int32 overflow fail with evidence_shape_invalid/exit 20 and empty stderr; the actual raw-stdout helper rejects extra CRLF, extra LF and duplicate JSON. The 30-case PS5.1 self-test, both parser checks, final diff check and forbidden-command scan pass; scope remains limited and no live admission or benchmark ran.
